Company

Who We Serve Case Studies About Us Contact

WHO WE SERVE

Are We the Right Fit?

We work with families who have saved diligently and want expert guidance to make the most of their retirement. If you have $500K+ in retirement savings and are within 10 years of retirement (or already retired), we're built for you.

IDEAL CLIENTS

You Might Be a Good Fit If...

You've saved $500K+ for retirement

You've been disciplined with your savings and now need expert guidance to turn those assets into a reliable income stream that lasts.

You're within 10 years of retirement

You're approaching the transition (or have already made it) and need clarity on when to claim Social Security, how to withdraw tax-efficiently, and whether you have enough.

You want a fiduciary, not a salesperson

You've been burned by commission-based advisors or product pushers. You want someone legally obligated to put your interests first.

Taxes keep you up at night

You know taxes will be one of your biggest retirement expenses, and you want a strategy to minimize what you owe — legally and ethically.

You have a portfolio but not a plan

You've accumulated assets across multiple accounts, but no one has shown you how they all work together to fund your retirement lifestyle.

You're a federal employee

You have FERS, TSP, FEGLI, and FEHB — and most advisors have no idea what you're talking about. We do.

CLIENT PROFILES

Who We Help

Pre-Retirees (Age 55-65)

You're within striking distance of retirement and need answers: Do I have enough? When should I claim Social Security? How do I turn savings into income? What about healthcare before Medicare?

See Our Planning Process →

New Retirees (Age 62-70)

You've made the leap and need to optimize your new financial reality: Am I withdrawing from the right accounts? Should I do Roth conversions? How do I navigate Medicare and IRMAA?

Tax-Efficient Strategies →

Established Retirees (Age 70+)

You've been retired for years and want to preserve and transfer your wealth: How do I manage RMDs efficiently? Is my estate plan up to date? Should I consider charitable strategies?

Legacy Planning →

Federal Employees

You have a unique benefits package that requires specialized knowledge: How do I maximize my FERS annuity? What's the best TSP strategy? Should I keep FEGLI into retirement?

Federal Benefits Planning →

Who We Don't Serve

We're retirement income specialists, which means we focus on a specific type of client. We're not the right fit if you:

  • Have less than $500K in retirement savings
  • Are more than 10 years from retirement
  • Want someone to manage your day trades or stock picks
  • Need college savings or accumulation planning
  • Prefer commission-based advice or product sales

That's not a judgment — it's just not what we do. Our entire practice is built around retirement income planning, tax optimization, and fiduciary advice for families in or near retirement.

If you're within 10 years of retirement with $500K+ saved and want expert, fiduciary guidance, let's talk.

SCHEDULE CONSULTATION →

GET STARTED

Ready to Build Your Retirement Plan?

Start the conversation today. Initial consultations are complimentary for qualified families.
